details.reasoning: All rubric requirements fully met: ImageTextToTextPipeline class properly implemented with async _call method accepting images and text prompts; uses AutoModelForImageTextToText model and calls generate() for output; processor handles pixel_values encoding; returns generated_text in correct format; registered in SUPPORTED_TASKS as 'image-text-to-text' with type 'multimodal'; comprehensive JSDoc with proper @typedef definitions and usage example; follows existing pipeline patterns (batching, text reuse, output wrapping); no modifications to existing pipelines. Implementation is clean, well-documented, and handles edge cases correctly (fewer texts than images, tensor slicing for new tokens).
